summary: Decay Scheduler and System Status testing complete. All 17 backend tests PASSED. GET /api/system/status returns all 5 healthy components (database, trust_engine, trust_ledger, ai_layer, decay_scheduler). Scheduler is running with next_scheduled_run=2026-03-14T03:00:00 UTC. Duplicate-run protection verified - subsequent calls within 23-hour window are correctly skipped (0 new logs added). Execution log shows 1 successful decay run processing 8 users. Existing auth/trust APIs unaffected.
critical_code_review_comments: scheduler.py: APScheduler correctly configured with CronTrigger(hour=3, minute=0) for 03:00 UTC daily execution
Lock mechanism uses find_one_and_update with $or for atomic acquisition - prevents race conditions
MIN_RUN_INTERVAL_HOURS=23 ensures decay doesn't run more than once per day even with manual triggers
_release_lock correctly sets last_completed_at only on success, allowing retry on failures
system.py: All 5 components checked independently - graceful degradation if any fails
server.py: Scheduler starts on startup event, stops on shutdown - clean lifecycle management

verified_lock_mechanism.duplicate_run_protection: VERIFIED - 2 consecutive calls resulted in 0 new logs (within 23h window)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing test user and existing decay log from main agent's manual test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Decay scheduler with APScheduler + MongoDB lock fully verified. GET /api/system/status returns 5 components. Scheduler runs at 03:00 UTC daily. Lock prevents runs within 23 hours of last completion. decay_log collection stores execution history. scheduler_locks collection stores lock state. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_decay_scheduler.py

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real database operations
